texto: Oh, Al, shut up! Stop criticizing me! First I'm criticized for being a prude and sounding like a social worker or something, then I'm criticized for looking like a cheap broad. How am I supposed to live? Under the water or something, coming up only to say 'I beg your pardon if I disturb you by coming up for air. I'll do my best to remain submerged.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pamela Moore: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Oh, Al, shut up! Stop criticizing me! First I'm criticized for being a prude and sounding like a …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, female, feminism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e viagem.
